death.attack.mo_enchants.aquaphobia.play: %1$s forgot they were aquaphobic and tried to escape %2$s
death.attack.mo_enchants.bad_dreams.play: %1$s had a bad dream whilst trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.mo_enchants.bloodthirst.pla: %1$s got too bloodthirsty trying to kill %2$s
death.attack.mo_enchants.generic_curse.p: %1$s died of a curse whilst in combat with %2$s
death.attack.mo_enchants.harming_curse.p: %1$s hit themself too hard whilst trying to kill %2$s
Gives your Totem of Undying extra uses, +1 use per every level.
enchantment.mo_enchants.aqua_slash.desc: Does more damage to aquaphobic mobs.
enchantment.mo_enchants.aquaphobia_curse: Become afraid of water, taking damage while submerged.
enchantment.mo_enchants.bloodthirst.desc: Right-click this weapon to gain a temporary damage buff, in exchange for some health.
enchantment.mo_enchants.boiling_curse.de: Ignites you in hot or dry biomes.
enchantment.mo_enchants.conduction.desc: Conducts lightning to attacked enemies during storms.
enchantment.mo_enchants.critical_blow.de: Allows for the chance of critical hits, which do 150% damage.
enchantment.mo_enchants.density_curse.de: Increases your gravity, causing you to jump lower and fall faster.
enchantment.mo_enchants.detonation.desc: Enemies shot with this weapon explode into pieces.
enchantment.mo_enchants.fireproofing.des: Makes you immune to fire and lava.
enchantment.mo_enchants.first_strike.des: Does 25% more damage on first strikes.
enchantment.mo_enchants.green_thumb.desc: Prevents you from mining ungrown crops & stems.
enchantment.mo_enchants.harming_curse.de: Take damage when you damage any other mob.
enchantment.mo_enchants.insomnia_curse.d: Become unable to sleep due to nightmares.
enchantment.mo_enchants.levitating.desc: Shooting mobs will make them fly.
enchantment.mo_enchants.lifesteal.desc: Gives you a chance to steal attacked enemies health.
enchantment.mo_enchants.magma_walker.des: Creates a path while walking on lava.
enchantment.mo_enchants.night_vision.des: Gives you night vision when equipped.
enchantment.mo_enchants.panic.desc: Get regeneration and speed when your health is critically low.
enchantment.mo_enchants.reach.desc: Gives you +1 block of mining reach per level.
enchantment.mo_enchants.revenant.desc: Has a chance to instantly kill any undead mob.
enchantment.mo_enchants.rock_mending.des: Has a chance of not damaging the tool when mining rocks.
Heal enemies you attack with your health.
enchantment.mo_enchants.saving_grace.des: When you fall into the void, get launched back up.
Get ignited on fire when you're hurt.
enchantment.mo_enchants.smelting_touch.d: Automatically smelts any block you mine.
Enemies slain with this enchantment explode into pieces.
enchantment.mo_enchants.vitality.desc: Adds half a heart to your max health for each level.
enchantment.mo_enchants.weightless.desc: Decreases your gravity, allowing you to jump higher and fall slower.
